## ✅ Data gathering complete for LCID earnings preview

I've successfully gathered **80 LCID (Lucid Motors) earnings-related articles** and saved them to `/Users/aryaask/Desktop/quant/data/raw/earnings-beatmiss-B/_news/LCID/`

**Summary:**
- **Article count:** 80 JSON files (article_0001.json → article_0080.json)
- **Manifest:** `_done` file created with `count=80 at=2026-05-15T00:00:00Z`
- **Data schema:** Each article follows the strict JSON format with url, title, published_at, scraped_at, text, topic, and source_type

**Coverage includes:**
- Q1-Q4 2024 earnings reports and transcripts
- Q1 2026 earnings call and guidance suspension
- Gravity SUV production milestones and delays
- Uber robotaxi partnership ($500M, 35,000 vehicles)
- Saudi Arabia/PIF strategic partnership ($1B+)
- Cash burn concerns and liquidity runway
- Analyst ratings and price target forecasts
- Production disruption details
- CEO transitions and cost reduction initiatives

All articles are timestamped and ready for the downstream temporal-leak prevention pipeline.

Sources:
- [Yahoo Finance](https://finance.yahoo.com)
- [The Motley Fool](https://www.fool.com)
- [PR Newswire](https://www.prnewswire.com)
- [Seeking Alpha](https://seekingalpha.com)
- [CNBC](https://www.cnbc.com)
- [Investing.com](https://www.investing.com)
- [Lucid Investor Relations](https://ir.lucidmotors.com)
